They Go to the Field Komar Rien Komar Cheh
Where is Dany going? She is looking for Dara.
Where is Dara going? Dara is following his cow.
Where is the cow going? The cow is following the bird.
Where is the bird going? The bird is following the dog.
Where is the dog going? The dog is following the snake.
Where is the snake going? The snake is chasing the frog.
Where is the frog going? The frog is jumping toward the field.
Where are they all going? They are going to the field.
